# Panthera Bertam

> Panthera Bertam is a small freehold residential estate of 19 homes (3 bungalows and 16 semi-detached houses) arranged around a shared central park of over 700 m2 in Bertam, Seberang Perai Utara, Penang, Malaysia. Developed by Panthera Development Sdn Bhd. Pre-launch in 2026, estimated handover Q4 2028. Official site: https://www.pantheraestate.com

## Key facts

- Location: Bertam, Seberang Perai Utara (Penang mainland), Malaysia. Lot 24480. Approx coordinates 5.5307 N, 100.4655 E.
- Total land: 1.96 acres (about 0.794 hectares), freehold.
- Homes: 19 total. 3 bungalows + 16 semi-detached. All two-storey, modern tropical design.
- Central green: a shared park of over 700 m2 that every home faces; dedicated public open space, never to be built over.
- On-site infrastructure: 40-foot inner ring road, generous setbacks (49 to 201 m2 green margin per lot), 298 m2 retention pond (kolam tadahan).
- Pricing: Semi-detached from RM 610,000. Bungalows from RM 860,000. Six Bumiputera-reserved lots receive a 5% discount.
- Semi-detached spec: 1,917 sq ft built-up, 210 to 318 m2 land, 4 bed, 4 bath, 2 storey, freehold.
- Bungalow spec: 2,598 sq ft built-up, 356 to 493 m2 land, 5 bed, 6 bath, 2 storey, freehold.
- Included in price: full structure and finishes, sanitaryware, water heaters, electrical points, fibre and CAT-6 wiring. Kitchen cabinetry, air-conditioning and light fixtures are owner fit-out.
- Timeline: pre-launch 2026, 24-month build from SPA signing, estimated handover Q4 2028, protected by a Liquidated Ascertained Damages (LAD) clause.
- Why Bertam: five minutes from Penang Technology Park @ Bertam; the area is drawing major semiconductor and lithium-battery investment, including a RM 6.4 billion INV New Energy plant nearby. Schools, malls and a hospital are within a fifteen-minute drive.
- Languages: site available in English, Bahasa Malaysia and Chinese.

## Contact

- WhatsApp / phone sales: +60 17-598 1858 (https://wa.me/60175981858)
- Website: https://www.pantheraestate.com
- Developer: Panthera Development Sdn Bhd

## Notes

- All renders and perspective images on the site are artist's impressions for illustration only. The signed Sale and Purchase Agreement and stamped architectural drawings are the binding documents.
- This is a pre-launch registration site, not an e-commerce checkout. The primary call to action is to register interest or contact sales on WhatsApp.
